input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.10.5.5 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.10.5.5
            TITLE: teams must justify the accumulator container attachment using one of the two methods:

            CONTENT:
            rule F.10.5.5: Teams must justify the Accumulator Container attachment using one of the two methods:
F.10.5.5 Teams must justify the Accumulator Container attachment using one of the two methods: 
• Corner Attachments and Analysis   per F.10.5.6 and F.10.5.8 
• Load Based Analysis   per F.10.5.7 and F.10.5.8

final_answer: rule F.10.5.5: Teams must justify the Accumulator Container attachment using one of the two methods: F.10.5.5 Teams must justify the Accumulator Container attachment using one of the two methods: • Corner Attachments and Analysis per F.10.5.6 and F.10.5.8 • Load Based Analysis per F.10.5.7 and F.10.5.8
